enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Due diligence requirements with respect to LSPs
(1) Digital lending by an NBFC involving a LSP, shall be carried out under a
contractual agreement between the NBFC and the LSP, which clearly defines

enriched_requirements.object: a contractual agreement between the NBFC and the LSP, which clearly defines the respective roles, rights, and obligations of each

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

agreement with a LSP for digital lending, taking into account LSP's technical
capabilities, robustness of data privacy policies and storage systems, fairness

all applicable regulations and statutes.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

and any subsequent changes to this mechanism shall be properly
documented.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Loan disbursal, servicing and repayment
(1) Disbursement of loan by an NBFC shall always be made into the bank account
of the borrower except for disbursals covered exclusively under statutory or
regulatory mandate (of the Reserve Bank or of any other regulator), flow of
money between lenders for co-lending transactions and disbursals for specific
end use, provided the loan is disbursed directly into the bank account of the
end-beneficiary.
enriched_requirements.object: the bank account of the borrower except for disbursals covered exclusively under statutory or regulatory mandate (of the Reserve Bank or of any other regulator), flow of money between lenders for co-lending transactions and disbursals for specific end use

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

third-party account, including the accounts of LSP, except as provided for in

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Cooling-off period
(1) The borrower shall be given an explicit option to exit a digital loan by paying
the principal and the proportionate APR without any penalty during an initial
"cooling-off period".
enriched_requirements.object: option to exit a digital loan by paying the principal and the proportionate APR without any penalty during an initial "cooling-of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The cooling off period shall be determined by the NBFC in
terms of their credit policy, subject to the period so determined not being less
than one day.
enriched_requirements.object: NBFC in terms of their credit policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For borrower continuing with the loan even after cooling-off
period, pre-payment shall continue to be allowed as per Reserve Bank of India
(Non-Banking Financial Companies- Responsible Business Conduct)
Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as per Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies- Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) An NBFC may retain a reasonable one-time processing fee, if the customer
exits the loan during the cooling-off period.
enriched_requirements.object: processing fee

conditions: if applicable

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Grievance redressal
(1) An NBFC, and their LSP which has an interface with the borrower, shall
designate nodal grievance redressal officers to deal with digital lending related
complaints/ issues raised by the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: officers to deal with digital lending related complaints/ issues raised by the borrower

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Contact details of the nodal grievance redressal officers shall be prominently
displayed on the websites of the NBFC, its LSP and on the DLA, as well as in
the KFS provided to the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: the websites of the NBFC, its LSP and on the DLA, as well as in the KFS provided to the borrower

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

on the website as stated above.

This information shall be suitably conveyed

(1) An NBFC shall ensure that any collection of data by their DLA and DLA of their
LSP is need-based and with prior and explicit consent of the borrower having
audit trail.

of specific data, restrict disclosure to third parties, data retention, revoke
consent already granted to collect personal data and if required, make the
NBFC / LSP delete / forget the data.
enriched_requirements.object: option to give or deny consent for use of specific data, restrict disclosure to third parties, data retention, revoke consent alre

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Explicit consent of the borrower shall be taken before sharing personal
information with any third party, except for cases where such sharing is
required as per statutory or regulatory requirement.
enriched_requirements.object: personal information with any third party

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Storage of data
(1) An NBFC shall ensure that LSP engaged by them do not store personal
information of borrower except some basic minimal data (viz., name, address,
contact details of the customer, etc.) that may be required to carry out their
operations or service within the scope of the NBFC-LSP agreement.
enriched_requirements.object: by them do not store personal information of borrower except some basic minimal data (viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Responsibility regarding data privacy and security of the customer's personal
information on an ongoing basis shall be that of the NBFC.
enriched_requirements.object: NBFC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) An NBFC shall ensure that clear policy guidelines regarding the storage of
customer data including the type of data that can be stored, the length of time
for which data can be stored, restrictions on the use of data, data destruction
protocol, standards for handling security breach, etc., are put in place and also
disclosed by the NBFC and the LSP engaged by the NBFC prominently on
their website and DLA at all times.
enriched_requirements.object: guidelines regarding the storage of customer data including the type of data that can be stored, the length of time for which

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) An NBFC shall ensure that no biometric data is stored / collected by the NBFC
and LSP, unless allowed under extant statutory guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: data is stored / collected by the NBFC and LSP

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) An NBFC shall ensure that all data is stored only in servers located within India,
while ensuring compliance with statutory obligations/ regulatory instructions.
enriched_requirements.object: is stored only in servers located within India, while ensuring compliance with statutory obligations/ regulatory instructions

conditions: in case the data is processed outside India
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

enriched_requirements.object: outside India and brought back to India within 24 hours of processing

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Comprehensive privacy policy
(1) An NBFC and their LSPs shall have a comprehensive privacy policy compliant
with applicable laws, associated regulations and RBI guidelines which shall be

be.
enriched_requirements.object: policy compliant with applicable laws, associated regulations and RBI guidelines which shall be made available publicly o

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Technology standards
An NBFC shall ensure that they and the LSPs engaged by them comply with
various technology standards/ requirements on cybersecurity stipulated by the
Reserve Bank and other relevant agencies, or as may be specified from time to
time, for undertaking digital lending.
enriched_requirements.object: the LSPs engaged by them comply with various technology standards/ requirements on cybersecurity stipulated by the Reserve Bank a

CIC Regulations, 2006 and related guidelines
issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time, NBFC shall ensure that any

deferred payment credit products shall abide by the extant outsourcing

those of the LSPs, either exclusively or as a platform participant, on the

Bank in the requisite format as given in the Annex-I to these Directions.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The Chief Compliance Officer of the NBFC or any other official designated by

grievances of customers concerning DLAs shall be addressed and dealt with

Eligibility as DLG provider
An NBFC may enter into DLG arrangements only with an LSP / other lender
engaged as an LSP.
enriched_requirements.object: only with an LSP / other lender engaged as an LSP

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the LSP providing DLG shall be incorporated as a
company under the Companies Act, 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: company under the Companies Act, 2013

conditions: if any, payable to/ received by the DLG provider
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Due diligence and other requirements with respect to DLG provider
(1) An NBFC, including an NBFC acting as DLG provider, shall lay down, as part
of its policy, the eligibility criteria for DLG provider, nature and extent of DLG
cover, process of monitoring and reviewing the DLG arrangement, and the
details of the fees, if any, payable to/ received by the DLG provider, as the case
may be before entering into any DLG arrangement.
enriched_requirements.object: of its policy, the eligibility criteria for DLG provider, nature and extent of DLG cover, process of monitoring and reviewing the DLG arrangement, and the details of the fees

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) An NBFC shall ensure that any DLG arrangement does not act as a substitute
for credit appraisal requirements and robust credit underwriting standards need
to be put in place irrespective of the DLG cover.
enriched_requirements.object: arrangement does not act as a substitute for credit appraisal requirements and robust credit underwriting standards need to be put

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Every time an NBFC enters into or renews a DLG arrangement, it shall obtain
adequate information to satisfy itself that the entity extending DLG would be

project and includes, inter-alia, designing, planning, obtaining all applicable
clearances / approvals till its financial closure.
enriched_requirements.object: three phases namely: (1) Design phase - This is the first phase which starts with the genesis of the project and includes, int

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The credit policy of an NBFC shall incorporate suitable clauses for sanction of
project finance exposures, taking into account inter alia the provisions under these
Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: sanction of project finance exposures, taking into account inter alia the provisions under these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For all projects financed by a lender, it shall be ensured that:
(1) Financial closure has been achieved and original DCCO is clearly spelt out and
documented prior to disbursement of funds.
enriched_requirements.object: Financial closure has been achieved and original DCCO is clearly spelt out and documented prior to disbursement of funds

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, the original or revised repayment tenor, including the
moratorium period, if any, shall not exceed 85 per cent of the economic life of
a project.
enriched_requirements.object: of the economic life of a project

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For a given project, original / extended / actual DCCO, as the case may be, shall
be same across all lenders to the project.
enriched_requirements.object: lenders to the project

conditions:
where the aggregate exposure of the lenders is up
to ₹1
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In under-construction projects where the aggregate exposure of the lenders is up
to ₹1,500 crores, no individual lender shall have an exposure which is less than 10
per cent of the aggregate exposure.
enriched_requirements.object: is less than 10 per cent of the aggregate exposure

conditions:
where aggregate exposure of all
lenders is more than ₹1
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For projects where aggregate exposure of all
lenders is more than ₹1,500 crores, the exposure floor for an individual lender shall
be 5 per cent or ₹150 crores, whichever is higher.
enriched_requirements.object: or ₹150 crores, whichever is higher

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, the above minimum exposure requirements shall not apply post-
actual DCCO and lenders may freely acquire from or sell exposures to other
lenders, in compliance with guidelines contained in the Reserve Bank of India
(Non- Banking Financial Companies - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk)
Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: and lenders may freely acquire from or sell exposures to other lenders, in compliance with guidelines contained in the Reserve

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Prior to actual DCCO, lenders may acquire from or sell
exposures to other lenders under a syndication arrangement (as specified under
the Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Transfer and
Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025), provided the share of individual
lenders is in adherence to the above limits.
enriched_requirements.object: exposures to other lenders under a syndication arrangement (as specified under the Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall ensure that all applicable approvals / clearances for implementing
/ constructing the project are obtained before financial closure.
enriched_requirements.object: approvals / clearances for implementing / constructing the project are obtained before financial closure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Approvals / clearances which are contingent upon achievement of certain
milestones in terms of project completion shall be deemed to be applicable only
when such milestones are achieved.
enriched_requirements.object: applicable only when such milestones are achieved

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Hence, the same shall not be
treated as an applicable mandatory pre-requisite at the time of financial closure.
enriched_requirements.object: applicable mandatory pre-requisite at the time of financial closure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall ensure availability of sufficient land / right of way for all projects
before disbursement of funds, subject to the following minimum requirements:
(1) For infrastructure projects under PPP model - 50 per cent
(2) For all other projects (non-PPP infrastructure, and non-infrastructure including
CRE & CRE-RH) - 75 per cent
(3) For transmission line projects - as decided by a NBFC
enriched_requirements.object: land / right of way for all projects before disbursement of funds

conditions: In case of infrastructure projects under PPP model
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of infrastructure projects under PPP model, disbursement of funds shall
begin only after declaration of the Appointed Date or its equivalent, for the project.
enriched_requirements.object: of the Appointed Date or its equivalent, for the project

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in respect of the exposures mentioned at paragraph 73 above, the original
DCCO documented in the financial closure document may be modified to reflect
any change in the 'Appointed Date' by the concession granting authority prior to
disbursement of funds by way of a supplementary agreement between a lender
and the debtor subject to reassessment of project viability and obtention of
sanction from appropriate authorities.
enriched_requirements.object: any change in the 'Appointed Date' by the concession granting authority prior to disbursement of funds by way of a supplementar

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A Techno-Economic Viability (TEV) study
shall be required for this purpose for all projects where the aggregate exposure of
all lenders is ₹100 crores or more.
enriched_requirements.object: purpose for all projects where the aggregate exposure of all lenders is ₹100 crores or more

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall ensure that disbursal is proportionate to the stages of completion
of the project as also to the progress in equity infusion and other sources of
finance, agreed as part of financial closure and receipt of remaining applicable
clearances.
enriched_requirements.object: proportionate to the stages of completion of the project as also to the progress in equity infusion and other sources of fina

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The lender's Independent Engineer (LIE) / Architect shall certify the
stages of completion of the project.
enriched_requirements.object: completion of the project

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A project finance account may be classified as NPA during any time before actual
DCCO as per record of recovery, in terms of Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking
Financial Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning)
Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: during any time before actual DCCO as per record of recovery, in terms of Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Project specific data, in electronic and easily accessible format, shall be captured
and maintained by lenders on an ongoing basis.
enriched_requirements.object: by lenders on an ongoing basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A list of the relevant parameters
which shall form part of project finance database, at a minimum, is given below.
enriched_requirements.object: finance database, at a minimum, is given below

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall update any change in parameters of a project finance exposure at
the earliest, but not later than 15 days from such change.
enriched_requirements.object: parameters of a project finance exposure at the earliest, but not later than 15 days from such change

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The necessary system
in this regard shall be put in place within three months of the effective date.
enriched_requirements.object: within three months of the effective date

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall make appropriate disclosures in their financial statements, under
'Notes to Accounts', as specified in the Reserve Bank of India (NBFCs - Financial
Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: their financial statements, under 'Notes to Accounts', as specified in the Reserve Bank of India (NBFCs - Financial St

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC in the Middle Layer and above may provide Partial Credit Enhancement
(PCE) to bonds issued by corporates/ special purpose vehicles (SPVs) for funding
all types of projects and to bonds issued by Non-deposit taking NBFCs with asset
size of ₹1,000 crore and above registered with RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: (PCE) to bonds issued by corporates/ special purpose vehicles (SPVs) for funding all types of projects and to bonds

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PCE may also be provided to
bonds issued by Municipal Corporations.
enriched_requirements.object: bonds issued by Municipal Corporations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The credit policy of the NBFC shall incorporate suitable provisions for issue of
PCE, covering issues such as quantum of PCE, underwriting standards,
assessment of risk, pricing, setting limits, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: issue of PCE, covering issues such as quantum of PCE, underwriting standards, assessment of risk, pricing, setting

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PCE shall be a subordinated facility provided in the form of an irrevocable
contingent line of credit which will be drawn in case of shortfall in cash flows for
servicing the bonds and thereby may improve the credit rating of the bond issue.
enriched_requirements.object: provided in the form of an irrevocable contingent line of credit which will be drawn in case of shortfall in cash flows for

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A clear agreement documenting all aspects of this arrangement shall be signed
between the promoter (bond issuer), the PCE providing NBFC, the bondholders
(through the Trustee) and all other lenders to the project.
enriched_requirements.object: promoter (bond issuer), the PCE providing NBFC, the bondholders (through the Trustee) and all other lenders to the project

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The agreement to this
effect shall be in the nature of a legally binding contract.
enriched_requirements.object: of a legally binding contract

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The documentation for
the facility shall clearly define the circumstances under which the facility would be
drawn upon.
enriched_requirements.object: under which the facility would be drawn upon

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PCE exposure limit by a single NBFC shall be 50 per cent of the bond issue
size.
enriched_requirements.object: of the bond issue size

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PCE facility shall be provided at the time of the bond issue and shall be
irrevocable.
enriched_requirements.object: time of the bond issue and shall be irrevocable

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As the purpose of PCE by NBFC is to enable wide investor participation in the
corporate bond market, NBFC shall not invest in corporate bonds which are credit
enhanced by any Regulated Entity of the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: which are credit enhanced by any Regulated Entity of the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
They may, however,
provide other need based credit facilities to the corporate/ SPV.
enriched_requirements.object: need based credit facilities to the corporate/ SPV

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC may offer PCE only in respect of bonds whose pre-enhanced rating are
not lower than "BBB" minus as issued by accredited External Credit Assessment
Institutions (ECAI).
enriched_requirements.object: respect of bonds whose pre-enhanced rating are not lower than "BBB" minus as issued by accredited External Credit Assessment Institu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To be eligible for PCE, corporate bonds shall be rated by a minimum of two ECAI
at all times.
enriched_requirements.object: minimum of two ECAI at all times

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The rating reports, both initial and subsequent, shall disclose both standalone
credit rating (i.e., rating without taking into account the effect of PCE) as well as
the enhanced credit rating (taking into account the effect of PCE).
enriched_requirements.object: rating (i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PCE shall be available only for servicing the bond and not for any other
purpose (such as funding acquisition of additional assets by the corporate, meeting
enriched_requirements.object: servicing the bond and not for any other purpose (such as funding acquisition of additional assets by the corporate, meeting

conditions: In case the PCE facility is partly drawn and interest accrues on the same
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the PCE facility is partly drawn and interest accrues on the same, the
unpaid accrued interest shall be excluded from the calculation of the remaining
amount available for drawing.
enriched_requirements.object: calculation of the remaining amount available for drawing

enriched_requirements.timeline:
within 30 days from the date
of its drawal
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Keeping this aspect in view, a drawn tranche of the
contingent PCE facility shall be required to be repaid within 30 days from the date
of its drawal (due date).
enriched_requirements.object: repaid within 30 days from the date of its drawal (due date)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The facility shall be treated as NPA if it remains
outstanding for 90 days or more from the due date and provided for as per the
usual asset classification and provisioning norms.
enriched_requirements.object: if it remains outstanding for 90 days or more from the due date and provided for as per the usual asset classification and provision

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In that event, the NBFC's other
facilities to the borrower shall also be classified as NPA as per extant guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: NPA as per extant guidelines

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PCE providing NBFC shall observe the following exposure limits:
1) PCE exposure by the NBFC to a single counterparty or group of counterparties
shall be within the overall regulatory exposure limits applicable to the NBFC.
enriched_requirements.object: limits: 1) PCE exposure by the NBFC to a single counterparty or group of counterparties shall be within the overall reg

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
2) The aggregate PCE exposure of the NBFC shall not exceed 20 per cent of its
Tier 1 capital.
enriched_requirements.object: of its Tier 1 capital

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The tenor of the bond issued by NBFCs for which PCE is provided shall not be
less than three years.
enriched_requirements.object: years

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The proceeds from the bonds backed by PCE from the NBFC shall only be utilized
for refinancing the existing debt of the NBFCs The NBFC shall introduce
appropriate mechanisms to monitor and ensure that the end-use condition is met.
enriched_requirements.object: refinancing the existing debt of the NBFCs The NBFC shall introduce appropriate mechanisms to monitor and ensure that the end-use

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The exposure of the NBFC by way of PCEs to bonds issued by each such NBFC
shall be restricted to one percent of capital funds of the RE within the extant single
/ group borrower exposure limits.
enriched_requirements.object: percent of capital funds of the RE within the extant single / group borrower exposure limits

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The effect of the PCE on the bond rating shall be disclosed in the bond offer
document i.e., the rating of the bond without and with the PCE shall be disclosed.
enriched_requirements.object: bond offer document i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC shall ensure that the project assets, created out of the bond issue
for which PCE has been provided by them, and the cash flows from the project are
ring fenced through an escrow account mechanism administered under a bond
trustee arrangement.
enriched_requirements.object: assets, created out of the bond issue for which PCE has been provided by them, and the cash flows from the project are ring fe

conditions: if any, and the bonds and PCE
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The manner in which security interest in the project assets
would be shared by the lenders to the project, bond holders and the NBFC
providing the PCE and the manner in which the project cash flows would be shared
for servicing loans, if any, and the bonds and PCE, shall be decided and agreed
upon before the issue of bonds and shall be properly documented.
enriched_requirements.object: upon before the issue of bonds and shall be properly documented

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The project shall have a robust and viable financial structure even before the
credit enhancement is taken into account.
enriched_requirements.object: viable financial structure even before the credit enhancement is taken into account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Nevertheless, while providing PCE, the
NBFC shall exercise necessary due diligence and credit appraisal, including
making their own internal credit analysis / rating.
enriched_requirements.object: and credit appraisal, including making their own internal credit analysis / rating

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC shall honour the full PCE commitment irrespective of the asset
classification of the concerned borrower's credit facilities.
enriched_requirements.object: commitment irrespective of the asset classification of the concerned borrower's credit facilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All extant regulatory prescriptions for credit and investment exposures by the
NBFC, unless specified otherwise in these Directions, shall continue to apply.

There shall be a ceiling of ₹1 crore per borrower for financing subscription to
Initial Public Offer (IPO).
enriched_requirements.object: ₹1 crore per borrower for financing subscription to Initial Public Offer (IPO)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The NBFC shall not lend against its own shares.
enriched_requirements.object: shares

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC with asset size of ₹100 crore and above shall comply with the
following conditions while lending against the collateral of listed shares:
(1) maintain a LTV ratio of 50 per cent for loans granted against the collateral of
shares.
enriched_requirements.object: conditions while lending against the collateral of listed shares: (1) maintain a LTV ratio of 50 per cent for loans granted

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: LTV ratio of 50 per cent is required to be maintained at all times.
enriched_requirements.object: all times

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any
shortfall in the maintenance of the 50 percent LTV occurring on account of
movement in the share prices shall be made good within seven working days.
enriched_requirements.object: seven working days

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The NBFC with asset size of ₹100 crore and above shall also comply with the
following additional conditions:
enriched_requirements.object: following additional conditions:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC granting demand / call loans shall comply with the following
conditions:
(1) A cut-off date within which the repayment of demand or call loan shall be
demanded or called up.
enriched_requirements.object: conditions: (1) A cut-off date within which the repayment of demand or call loan shall be demanded or called up

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The sanctioning authority shall, record specific reasons in writing at the time of
sanctioning demand or call loan, if the cut-off date for demanding or calling up
such loan is stipulated beyond a period of one year from the date of sanction.
enriched_requirements.object: in writing at the time of sanctioning demand or call loan

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (3) The rate of interest which shall be payable on such loans.
enriched_requirements.object: loans

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Interest on such loans, as stipulated shall be payable either at monthly or
quarterly basis.
enriched_requirements.object: monthly or quarterly basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The sanctioning authority shall, record specific reasons in writing at the time of
sanctioning demand or call loan, if no interest is stipulated or a moratorium is
granted for any period.
enriched_requirements.object: in writing at the time of sanctioning demand or call loan

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) Such demand or call loans shall not be renewed unless the periodical review
has shown satisfactory compliance with the terms of sanction.
enriched_requirements.object: periodical review has shown satisfactory compliance with the terms of sanction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
While granting finance to housing / development projects, the NBFC shall also
stipulate as a part of the terms and conditions that:
(1) The builder / developer / owner / company shall disclose in the pamphlets /
brochures / display boards on-site, the name(s) of the entity to which the
property is mortgaged.
enriched_requirements.object: part of the terms and conditions that: (1) The builder / developer / owner / company shall disclose in the pamphlets / brochures /

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The builder/ developer/ company shall append the information relating to
mortgage while publishing advertisement of a particular scheme in
newspapers/ magazines etc.
enriched_requirements.object: to mortgage while publishing advertisement of a particular scheme in newspapers/ magazines etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The builder / developer / owner / company shall indicate in the pamphlets /
brochures, that they would provide No Objection Certificate (NOC) / permission
of the mortgagee entity for sale of flats/ property, if required.
enriched_requirements.object: / brochures, that they would provide No Objection Certificate (NOC) / permission of the mortgagee entity for sale of flats/ property

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the NBFC shall ensure compliance with the above stipulations and funds
shall not be released unless the builder / developer / owner / company fulfil the
above requirements.
enriched_requirements.object: builder / developer / owner / company fulfil the above requirements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
While appraising loan proposals involving real estate, the NBFC shall ensure
that the borrowers have obtained prior permission from Government / local
Government / other statutory authorities for the project, wherever required.
enriched_requirements.object: have obtained prior permission from Government / local Government / other statutory authorities for the project

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To
ensure that the loan approval process is not hampered on account of this, while
the proposals may be sanctioned in normal course, the disbursements shall be
made only after the borrower has obtained requisite clearances from the
Government/ their statutory authorities.
enriched_requirements.object: the borrower has obtained requisite clearances from the Government/ their statutory authorities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such project should ordinarily not include non-
residential commercial real estate.
enriched_requirements.object: residential commercial real estate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
shopping complex, school etc.) can also be
specified under CRE-RH, provided that the commercial area in the residential
housing project does not exceed 10 per cent of the total Floor Space Index (FSI)
of the project.
enriched_requirements.object: the residential housing project does not exceed 10 per cent of the total Floor Space Index (FSI) of the project

conditions:
In case the FSI of the commercial area in the predominantly
residential housing complex exceed the ceiling of the project loans
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the FSI of the commercial area in the predominantly
residential housing complex exceed the ceiling of the project loans, the entire loan
should be classified as CRE and not CRE-RH.
enriched_requirements.object: and not CRE-RH

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
Directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed shall continue to remain
repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue
to be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments
granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these
Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
not in any way prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder.
enriched_requirements.object: affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
